subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the verses and made them a sign from His presence, a proof from His court, and an evidence from His side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی انزل الایات و جعلها آیه من عنده و حجه من لدنه و برهانا من جانبه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @petitions to authorities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness
